overview: DemonZeno is a world-class free trading education platform and the official hub for the DMNZ meme token. It features a comprehensive 5-tier Trading Academy (Beginner to Master) with 75+ deep lessons, randomized anti-cheat quizzes, a prestigious certificate system, a public certificate wall, and the full DMNZ token story — all in a premium dark-only anime-inspired design.
features: 5-tier Trading Academy with 75+ lessons and locked progression
Top 5 global famous trader profiles and case studies
Advanced learning science: spaced repetition, mastery scoring, learning path recommendations
Anti-cheat randomized 30-question MCQ quizzes — perfect 30/30 required for certificate
Premium certificate images with 9-character unique ID, QR code, and tier badges
Public Certificate Wall with search, leaderboard, Hall of Masters, monthly challenges
Zeno AI embedded in lessons for trading education Q&A
Full DMNZ token section with roadmap, Blum Mini App guide, and downloadable whitepaper
Session-local Admin Dashboard with global certificate management and analytics
Complete dark-only premium design with chart pattern SVG diagrams
